cards.back: Hardware components that coordinate and manage the timing of data transfer between devices in a system

cards.front: What is the primary function of a bus in synchronization hardware?
cards.back: To transfer data between devices at the same rate and timing

cards.front: What is the purpose of a clock signal in synchronization hardware?
cards.back: To provide a timing reference for data transfer between devices

cards.front: What type of synchronization hardware is used to connect peripherals to the CPU?
What type of synchronization hardware is used to connect devices to a network?
